description_long: This rifle features a long, rectangular receiver with a prominent Picatinny rail running along the top, suitable for mounting various optics or accessories. The body is predominantly matte black, with a metallic, slightly reflective section near the center, likely representing the bolt or ejection port. A short, cylindrical barrel protrudes from the front, and a vertical grip or magazine well is visible beneath the main body. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with clean lines and a robust, industrial appearance. The rifle lacks a visible stock, giving it a compact, tactical profile. The materials suggest a combination of metal and polymer, typical for contemporary urban firearms.
description: A modern, compact black rifle with a long Picatinny rail, short barrel, and no visible stock, featuring a metallic central section and a vertical grip or magazine well.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow barrel and the vertical alignment of the body, with the Picatinny rail visible on top.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the rifle, the Picatinny rail, the metallic bolt area, and the vertical grip or magazine well beneath.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the rectangular back end and the symmetry of the rail and body, with the barrel barely visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the length, rail, and grip, but from the other side.
